long_description:
[Network] Daemonset High Memory Usage is Triggered on mzone2h7

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/genctl-network-high-cpu-memory-usage.html
TIP Short Description: fabcon-manager in mzone2h7 is using over 80% of CPU limit
TIP Situation: Observed issue in service-error-Daemonset High Memory Usage
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-network-genctl:::mzone2h7::

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:
    max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{container_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager", kube_pod_name!=""}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80 = 80.0231
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2h7' and kube_node_name = 'syd1-qz1-sr3-rk086-s36' and kube_pod_name = 'fabcon-manager-69bgm'

Time:             12/09/2025 06:00 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://au-syd.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/f9a760b0-def7-4181-b0e9-e0969e1736e7?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F13901127%2Fdetails

------

Team:         Monitor Operations

    Everywhere
Alert When:   max(avg_over_time(sysdig_container_memory_limit_used_percent{container_name=~"fabcon-manager|fabcon-edge-manager", kube_pod_name!=""}[10m])) by (kube_cluster_name,kube_node_name,kube_pod_name)>80
